posts.author: laernst (Lauren Ernst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would love to be able to base automations on the team/sub-team. E.g. if person is [team name] create sub item for [person a].

What are you trying to achieve

I’m trying to establish a workflow for when multiple people need to do the same task (specifically review documents) simultaneously without hitting copy (and then needing to delete (copy).
